title: alternanthera kurtzii
intro: Alternanthera kurtzii, also known as red calyx or red button, is a species of flowering plant in the family Amaranthaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating gastrointestinal problems. The herbal preparations of Alternanthera kurtzii include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which are typically prepared by steeping the leaves or roots in water.
